title: Extend M365 sensitivity labeling to assets in Microsoft Purview data map
remediation:
1. In the Microsoft Purview compliance portal, navigate to the Information Protection page.
  2. If you've recently provisioned your subscription for Information Protection, it may take a few hours for the Information Protection page to display.
  3. In the Microsoft Purview data map area, turn on Extend labeling to assets and then select Yes in the confirmation dialog that appears.
